basic_details.job_title: ABV-IIITM Gwalior Non Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Junior Superintendent, Staff Nurse and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Indian Institute of Information Technology and Management, Gwalior
basic_details.post_name: Junior Superintendent, Staff Nurse and Junior Technical Superintendent

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age Relaxation: As per Govt. of India norms

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Bachelor's degree with 5 years' experience as Senior Assistant/Assistant in Pay Level-5, First Class Bachelor's degree in Library Science with 5 years' experience as Senior Assistant/Assistant (Library) in Pay Level-5, First Class Bachelor's degree in Hindi or English with 5 years' experience as Senior Assistant/Assistant (Hindi Translator) in Pay Level-5, BE/B.Tech(CSE/IT)/MCA/ M.Sc. (Computer Science) (Electrical & Electronics Engineering) / M.Sc. (Electrical/Instrumentation, Electronics/EEE/Mechatronics Engineering) with 5 years' experience in Level-5, B.Sc. in Nursing with 2 years experience OR 3 years diploma in Nursing & Midwifery with 5 years experience
qualification.details: Junior Superintendent: First Class Bachelor's degree with 5 years' experience as Senior Assistant/Assistant in Pay Level-5 in the relevant area. Junior Superintendent (Library): First Class Bachelor's degree in Library Science with 5 years' experience as Senior Assistant/Assistant (Library) in Pay Level-5 in the relevant area. Junior Superintendent (Translator): First Class Bachelor's degree in Hindi or English with English or Hindi as a compulsory or elective subject or as a medium of examination at the degree level; alongwith 5 years' experience as Senior Assistant/Assistant (Hindi Translator) in Pay Level-5 in the relevant area. Junior Technical Superintendent: BE/B.Tech(CSE/IT)/MCA/ M.Sc. (Computer Science) (Electrical & Electronics Engineering) / M.Sc. (Electrical/Instrumentation, Electronics/EEE/Mechatronics Engineering) with 5 years' experience in Level-5 or equivalent industrial experience. Staff Nurse: B.Sc. in Nursing with 2 years experience OR 3 years diploma in Nursing & Midwifery with 5 years experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ABV-IIITM Gwalior Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.iiitm.ac.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Superintendent posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Junior Superintendent posts is 29th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the institute by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Superintendent posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for Junior Superintendent and related posts. The specific distribution for each specialization is detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Superintendent post?
faq.answer: A First Class Bachelor's degree with 5 years of experience as a Senior Assistant/Assistant in Pay Level-5 is required for the general Junior Superintendent post. Other specializations have specific qualifications.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 32 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Junior Superintendent posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will be appointed at Level-6 of the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC), which offers a competitive salary.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: General and OBC category candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 1000/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: SC/ST category candidates need to pay an application fee of Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it to the specified address.

faq.question: Q9. What are the selection stages for the ABV-IIITM Gwalior recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically includes a Written Test, followed by an Interview, and potentially a Trade Test depending on the post.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the ABV-IIITM Gwalior website. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
